equite.title: Equity dashboard (GPI & zone)
equite.subtitle: Girls/boys parity · urban-rural gap · at-risk schools (UNESCO/IIEP thresholds).

errors.load: Equity data unavailable — check backend or cache.

banner.title: Restricted name display
banner.message: Some names are anonymised based on your access level (Law 037/AN/2016 on personal data protection).

consent.title: Privacy policy
consent.intro: Welcome. Before using the GESTION-EE platform, please read the summary below and confirm your consent.

bullets.data: Data collected: student identity, schooling, attendance, results, parent contact.
bullets.purpose: Purpose: steer the national education system and improve equity (girls, rural areas).
bullets.retention: Retention: schooling period + 5 years (audit logs: 3 years).
bullets.access: Right to access your logs: "My access" section of the user menu (Module 5C).
bullets.erasure: Right to be forgotten: contact the ministry DPO (Module 5D, anonymisation within 30 days).
bullets.minors: For minor pupils, parental consent is represented by the signed school registration.
bullets.contact: DPO contact: dpo@education.gouv.gn — Ministry of National Education.

mentions.title: Legal notice
mentions.body: GESTION-EE is published by the Ministry of National Education of the Republic of Guinea. Hosting is provided on sovereign servers. Publication director: Secretary General of the Ministry.

data.title: Data collected
data.body: The categories of data processed are strictly necessary for public service missions:
data.itemIdentity: Student identity (last name, first name, date of birth, sex, photo where applicable).
data.itemSchool: School data (school, class, attendance, grades, report cards).
data.itemHealth: School health data (allergies, vaccinations, nurse visits) — restricted access.
data.itemContact: Parental contact (name, phone) for school-family communication.

purpose.title: Purposes
purpose.body: Steering the national education system, optimising the allocation of teachers and infrastructure, correcting territorial disparities, improving girls' schooling, fighting dropouts.

legalBasis.title: Legal bases
legalBasis.body: Law 037/AN/2016 of the Republic of Guinea on personal data protection. GDPR (EU) for users residing in the European Union. Public interest mission (art. 6.1.e GDPR).

retention.title: Retention periods
retention.body: Identifying school data: schooling period + 5 years. Report cards and diplomas: indefinite (national archive). Audit logs: 3 years. Anonymised data: kept for public statistics.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: Under Law 037/AN/2016 and the GDPR, you have the following rights:
rights.itemAccess: Right of access: view your data and access logs concerning you.
rights.itemRectification: Right to rectification: correction of inaccurate data via your school.
rights.itemErasure: Right to be forgotten: anonymisation of identifying data (Module 5D).
rights.itemPortability: Right to portability: export of your data in an open format.
rights.itemObjection: Right to object: refusal of non-essential processing.

contact.title: DPO contact
contact.body: For any question or to exercise your rights, contact the Data Protection Officer of the Ministry: dpo@education.gouv.gn — postal address: Ministry of National Education, Boulevard du Commerce, Conakry, Guinea.

reorganisation.title: School network reorganisation
reorganisation.subtitle: Enriched GIS map to support reorganisation decisions (Module 3A).
reorganisation.errorLoad: Cartography layers unavailable — check backend or cache.

descriptions.infrastructureGaps: Missing water, electricity, latrines or internet.

simulateur.title: What-if simulator of the school network
simulateur.subtitle: Simulate opening, closing or merging schools and measure the impact (Module 3B).

impact.title: Scenario impact
impact.empty: Compute the impact to see the report.

transferts.title: Teacher transfers
transferts.subtitle: Review over/under-staffed schools and validate suggested transfers (Module 2D).

investissements.title: Investment priorities
investissements.subtitle: National ranking of schools to invest in first (Module 3C).
